## Description
Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New component
- [ ] Prompt improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Architecture change

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this with real tasks (not just synthetic examples)
- [ ] Prompt changes include before/after comparison
- [ ] New components follow the architecture guidelines in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- [ ] Attribution is added for any third-party code

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue)
